---
title: "Minh-Thanh Nguyen"
sortby: "Nguyen, Minh-Thanh"
subtitle: "PhD Student (TCD)"
image: nguyenminh_thanh.jpg
toc: false
started: "Mar. 2026"
ended: "Current"
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Graduate Students</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Biography
Minh-Thanh Nguyen received the B.Eng. degree in Electronics and Telecommunications from Hanoi University of Science and Technology, Vietnam, in 2025. He is currently pursuing a Ph.D. degree in Computer Science at Trinity College Dublin, Ireland. His research interests include 5G network slicing, cloud and edge computing, optimization techniques, and machine learning for networked systems.

## Education

- Trinity College Dublin, The University of Dublin]{.fw-bold} | Dublin, Ireland<br />
  Ph.D. in Computer Science | 2026-2030

- [Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST)]{.fw-bold} | Hanoi, Vietnam<br />
  B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunications | 2025
